problem id: fb955790
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10000010 -> 10010000
  10110100 -> 00010110
  01010000 -> 00001010
  00000111 -> 11000000
  00101000 -> 00000101
  00000011 -> 11000000
  10110110 -> 10010110
  10011111 -> 11010011

query: 00010101
predicted answer: 01000010
